use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and dashboards
Destructive action triggers with visual warning styling
Icon-only buttons for toolbars and compact UI areas
Navigation actions styled consistently across applications
Ghost buttons for tertiary actions in dense interfaces
ai_summary: A flexible, accessible button component built on Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility. Supports multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon) via class-variance-authority. Includes proper focus-visible outlines, disabled states, and SVG pointer event handling for consistent cross-browser behavior.
